title: Increase Email Size Limit in monday.com CRM
excerpt:
Description
The current email size limit in monday.com CRM is too restrictive. Many clients rely on monday.com to manage all their communications, but larger emails cannot be sent or tracked directly within the platform.…

posts.author: SupportRed (Support)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The current email size limit in monday.com CRM is too restrictive. Many clients rely on monday.com to manage all their communications, but larger emails cannot be sent or tracked directly within the platform. This forces users to either break up their messages or pay for a third-party app just to handle bigger emails.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to see the maximum email size limit increased in monday.com CRM. This would allow users to send and track all their client emails directly in monday.com without external tools. The goal is to improve workflow efficiency, keep communication centralized, and avoid unnecessary extra costs.

posts.author: Nakwurst (Sandro Wu)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, 15mb is way too small when you’re sending project drawings, etc.

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SupportRed and @Nakwurst! You’re right - the email size limit in monday CRM is pretty restrictive, especially when clients send long threads or attachments. It breaks the whole “centralize communication” idea when you’re forced to split emails or move outside the platform just to get a message through.

If you need a practical workaround right now, Email to Tasks for monday.com handles much larger emails than the native Emails & Activities tool. You can forward or BCC full email threads (including large attachments) directly to an item, and they’re logged without hitting monday’s size cap. It keeps everything in one place until monday expands the native limit
